name: HAWAIIAN HOLDINGS  DL-,01
summary: Hawaiian Holdings, Inc. is the parent company of Hawaiian Airlines, which provides air transportation services between the Hawaiian Islands, and from Hawaii to the continental U.S. and international destinations. Headquartered in Honolulu, Hawaii, it focuses on leisure and business travel markets. TICKER: Hawaiian Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Hawaiian Airlines, provides air transportation services between the Hawaiian Islands, the continental U.S., and international destinations, focusing on leisure and business travel.
